# Governing Agentic AI In Software Engineering

This note represents the imported audio file
`research/hmrc-beyond-hype/import/Governing_agentic_AI_in_software_engineering.m4a` in the narrative pack.

## Narrative Use

Use this dialogue as the governance strand: agentic software engineering needs explicit boundaries around autonomy, tools, approvals, and production authority.
